recommendations.title: Martyrs
recommendations.overview: A woman and her childhood friend seek out revenge on those who victimized and abused them.

recommendations.title: The Crazies
recommendations.overview: Four friends find themselves trapped in their small hometown after they discover their friends and neighbors going quickly and horrifically insane.

recommendations.title: The Thing
recommendations.overview: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims.

recommendations.title: Summer of 84
recommendations.overview: After suspecting that their police officer neighbor is a serial killer, a group of teenage friends spend their summer spying on him and gathering evidence, but as they get closer to discovering the truth, things get dangerous.
recommendations.director: Yoann-Karl Whissell, François Simard, Anouk Whissell

recommendations.title: The Super
recommendations.overview: A man becomes the superintendent of a large New York City apartment building where people mysteriously go missing.

recommendations.title: Bloody Hell
recommendations.overview: A man with a mysterious past flees the country to escape his own personal hell... only to arrive somewhere much worse. In an effort to survive this new horror, he turns to his personified conscience.

recommendations.title: Perdida
recommendations.overview: A policewoman whose childhood friend disappeared in Patagonia years ago starts a new search to find answers, and soon finds her own life in danger.

recommendations.title: Passing
recommendations.overview: In 1920s New York City, a Black woman finds her world upended when her life becomes intertwined with a former childhood friend who's passing as white.

recommendations.title: Never Rarely Sometimes Always
recommendations.overview: A pair of teenage girls in rural Pennsylvania travel to New York City to seek out medical help after an unintended pregnancy.

recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.
